section.heading: Federal Financing Bank

content.p: Notwithstanding section 687k of this title, the Federal Financing Bank may acquire a debenture issued by a Renewable Fuel Capital Investment company under this part.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 85–699, title III, § 391, as added Pub. L. 110–140, title XII, § 1207, Dec. 19, 2007, 121 Stat. 1782.)
